data.author: Noel215
data.message: tiago launcher

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+# Copyright 2022 PAL Robotics S.L.
+# All Rights Reserved.
+#
+# Unauthorized copying of this file, via any medium is strictly prohibited,
+# unless it was supplied under the terms of a license agreement or
+# nondisclosure agreement with PAL Robotics SL. In this case it may not be
+# copied or disclosed except in accordance with the terms of that agreement.
+
+import os
+from ament_index_python.packages import get_package_share_directory
+
+from launch import LaunchDescription
+from launch_pal.include_utils import include_launch_py_description
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+    # Create the launch description and populate
+    ld = LaunchDescription([
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'robot_control', ['launch', 'robot_control.launch.py'],
+            launch_arguments={
+              'description_path': os.path.join(
+                get_package_share_directory('tiago_description'), 'robots', 'tiago.urdf.xacro'),
+              'config_pkg': 'pal_deployer_cfg_tiago',
+            }.items(),
+        ),
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_bringup', ['launch', 'tiago_bringup.launch.py']
+        ),
+        include_launch_py_description(
+            'tiago_2dnav', ['launch', 'tiago_nav_bringup.launch.py'],
+            launch_arguments={
+                'use_sim_time': 'False',
+                'use_rviz': 'False',
+                }.items()),
+    ])
+
+    return ld

data.author: andreacapodacqua
data.message: added public sim config for mobile base controller

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,9 @@ mobile_base_controller:
     # Base frame_id
     base_frame_id: base_footprint
 
+    # odom tf will be published by direct laser odometry
+    enable_odom_tf: false
+
     # Preserve turning radius when limiting speed/acceleration/jerk
     preserve_turning_radius: true

@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
+mobile_base_controller:
+  ros__parameters:
+    use_stamped_vel: False
+    left_wheel_names  : ['wheel_left_joint']
+    right_wheel_names : ['wheel_right_joint']
+
+    # In ROS1 these physical properties were parsed from the URDF
+    wheel_radius: 0.0985
+    wheel_separation: 0.4044
+
+    wheel_separation_multiplier: 1.0
+    left_wheel_radius_multiplier: 1.0
+    right_wheel_radius_multiplier: 1.0
+
+    # The params below were used in ROS1 but not yet in ROS2
+    
+    publish_rate: 50.0
+    pose_covariance_diagonal : [0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.01]
+    twist_covariance_diagonal: [0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.001, 0.01]
+
+    enable_pose_covariance_update: true
+    error_constant_left : 0.001
+    error_constant_right: 0.001
+
+    # Velocity commands timeout [s]
+    cmd_vel_timeout: 0.25
+
+    # Base frame_id
+    base_frame_id: base_footprint
+
+    # odom tf will be published by direct laser odometry
+    enable_odom_tf: true
+
+    # Preserve turning radius when limiting speed/acceleration/jerk
+    preserve_turning_radius: true
+
+    # Publish limited velocity
+    publish_cmd: true
+
+    # Publish wheel data
+    publish_wheel_data: true
+
+    # Velocity and acceleration limits
+    # Whenever a min_* is unspecified, default to -max_*
+    linear:
+      x:
+        has_velocity_limits    : true
+        max_velocity           :  1.0 # m/s
+        min_velocity           : -0.2 # m/s
+        has_acceleration_limits: true
+        max_acceleration       :  1.0 # m/s^2
+        has_jerk_limits        : false
+        max_jerk               :  5.0 # m/s^3
+    angular:
+      z:
+        has_velocity_limits    : true
+        max_velocity           : 2.09 # 120.0º
+        has_acceleration_limits: true
+        max_acceleration       : 2.09 # 120.0º
+        has_jerk_limits        : false
+        max_jerk               : 10.47 # 600.0º
+

@@ -18,13 +18,24 @@

     calibration_config = '/etc/calibration/master_calibration.yaml'
 
@@ -33,7 +44,26 @@ def generate_launch_description():
     else:
         params_file = default_config
 
-    return generate_load_controller_launch_description(
+    load_controller_arg = generate_load_controller_launch_description(
         controller_name='mobile_base_controller',
         controller_type='diff_drive_controller/DiffDriveController',
         controller_params_file=params_file)
+
+    actions.append(load_controller_arg)
+    return actions
+
+
+def generate_launch_description():
+
+    is_public_sim_arg = DeclareLaunchArgument(
+        "is_public_sim",
+        default_value="false",
+        description="Whether or not you are using a public simulation",
+    )
+
+    ld = LaunchDescription()
+    ld.add_action(is_public_sim_arg)
+    controller_bringup_launch = OpaqueFunction(function=controller_bringup)
+    ld.add_action(controller_bringup_launch)
+
+    return ld

data.author: Hilario Tome
data.message: Initial commit

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 2.8.3)
+project(tiago_description)
+
+find_package(catkin REQUIRED)
+
+catkin_package()
+
+foreach(dir config gazebo Media meshes robots urdf)
+    install(DIRECTORY ${dir}/
+        DESTINATION ${CATKIN_PACKAGE_SHARE_DESTINATION}/${dir})
+endforeach(dir)

@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+
+<robot name="reemc">
+
+  <gazebo>
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_control.so" name="gazebo_ros_control">
+      <ns></ns>
+      <robotSimType>reemc_hardware_gazebo/ReemcHardwareGazebo</robotSimType>
+      <robotNamespace></robotNamespace>
+      <controlPeriod>0.001</controlPeriod>
+    </plugin>
+
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_p3d.so" name="gazebo_ros_p3d">
+      <bodyName>base_link</bodyName>
+      <topicName>ground_truth_odom</topicName>
+      <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+      <updateRate>100.0</updateRate>
+    </plugin>
+  </gazebo>
+
+  <gazebo>
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_force.so" name="gazebo_ros_force">
+      <bodyName>base_link</bodyName>
+      <topicName>base_link_wrench</topicName>
+    </plugin>
+  </gazebo>
+
+  <gazebo reference="imu_link">
+    <!-- this is expected to be reparented to pelvis with appropriate offset
+         when imu_link is reduced by fixed joint reduction -->
+    <!-- todo: this is working with gazebo 1.4, need to write a unit test -->
+    <sensor name="imu_sensor" type="imu">
+      <always_on>1</always_on>
+      <update_rate>1000.0</update_rate>
+      <imu>
+        <noise>
+          <type>gaussian</type>
+          <!-- Noise parameters from Boston Dynamics
+               (http://gazebosim.org/wiki/Sensor_noise):
+                 rates (rad/s): mean=0, stddev=2e-4
+                 accels (m/s/s): mean=0, stddev=1.7e-2
+                 rate bias (rad/s): 5e-6 - 1e-5
+                 accel bias (m/s/s): 1e-1
+               Experimentally, simulation provide rates with noise of
+               about 1e-3 rad/s and accels with noise of about 1e-1 m/s/s.
+               So we don't expect to see the noise unless number of inner iterations
+               are increased.
+
+               We will add bias.  In this model, bias is sampled once for rates
+               and once for accels at startup; the sign (negative or positive)
+               of each bias is then switched with equal probability.  Thereafter,
+               the biases are fixed additive offsets.  We choose
+               bias means and stddevs to produce biases close to the provided
+               data. -->
+          <rate>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>2e-4</stddev>
+            <bias_mean>0.0000075</bias_mean>
+            <bias_stddev>0.0000008</bias_stddev>
+          </rate>
+          <accel>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>1.7e-2</stddev>
+            <bias_mean>0.1</bias_mean>
+            <bias_stddev>0.001</bias_stddev>
+          </accel>
+        </noise>
+      </imu>
+    </sensor>
+  </gazebo>
+
+  <gazebo reference="r_foot">
+    <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+    <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    <fdir1>1 0 0</fdir1>
+    <maxVel>1.0</maxVel>
+    <minDepth>0.003</minDepth>
+  </gazebo>
+  <gazebo reference="l_foot">
+    <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+    <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    <fdir1>1 0 0</fdir1>
+    <maxVel>1.0</maxVel>
+    <minDepth>0.003</minDepth>
+  </gazebo>
+
+  <!-- define global properties -->
+  <property name="M_PI" value="3.1415926535897931" />
+
+</robot>

@@ -0,0 +1,666 @@
+<?xml version="1.0" ?>

+<!-- |    EDITING THIS FILE BY HAND IS NOT RECOMMENDED                                 | -->
+<!-- =================================================================================== -->
+<!--

+  All rights reserved.

+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot name="tiago" xmlns:controller="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#controller" xmlns:interface="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#interface" xmlns:sensor="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#sensor" xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+  <!-- The following included files set up definitions of parts of the robot body -->
+  <!-- Base -->
+  <!-- Torso -->
+  <!-- Generic simulator_gazebo plugins -->
+  <gazebo>
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_control.so" name="gazebo_ros_control">
+      <ns/>
+      <robotSimType>reemc_hardware_gazebo/ReemcHardwareGazebo</robotSimType>
+      <robotNamespace/>
+      <controlPeriod>0.001</controlPeriod>
+    </plugin>
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_p3d.so" name="gazebo_ros_p3d">
+      <bodyName>base_link</bodyName>
+      <topicName>ground_truth_odom</topicName>
+      <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+      <updateRate>100.0</updateRate>
+    </plugin>
+  </gazebo>
+  <gazebo>
+    <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_force.so" name="gazebo_ros_force">
+      <bodyName>base_link</bodyName>
+      <topicName>base_link_wrench</topicName>
+    </plugin>
+  </gazebo>
+  <gazebo reference="imu_link">
+    <!-- this is expected to be reparented to pelvis with appropriate offset
+         when imu_link is reduced by fixed joint reduction -->
+    <!-- todo: this is working with gazebo 1.4, need to write a unit test -->
+    <sensor name="imu_sensor" type="imu">
+      <always_on>1</always_on>
+      <update_rate>1000.0</update_rate>
+      <imu>
+        <noise>
+          <type>gaussian</type>
+          <!-- Noise parameters from Boston Dynamics
+               (http://gazebosim.org/wiki/Sensor_noise):
+                 rates (rad/s): mean=0, stddev=2e-4
+                 accels (m/s/s): mean=0, stddev=1.7e-2
+                 rate bias (rad/s): 5e-6 - 1e-5
+                 accel bias (m/s/s): 1e-1
+               Experimentally, simulation provide rates with noise of
+               about 1e-3 rad/s and accels with noise of about 1e-1 m/s/s.
+               So we don't expect to see the noise unless number of inner iterations
+               are increased.
+
+               We will add bias.  In this model, bias is sampled once for rates
+               and once for accels at startup; the sign (negative or positive)
+               of each bias is then switched with equal probability.  Thereafter,
+               the biases are fixed additive offsets.  We choose
+               bias means and stddevs to produce biases close to the provided
+               data. -->
+          <rate>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>2e-4</stddev>
+            <bias_mean>0.0000075</bias_mean>
+            <bias_stddev>0.0000008</bias_stddev>
+          </rate>
+          <accel>
+            <mean>0.0</mean>
+            <stddev>1.7e-2</stddev>
+            <bias_mean>0.1</bias_mean>
+            <bias_stddev>0.001</bias_stddev>
+          </accel>
+        </noise>
+      </imu>
+    </sensor>
+  </gazebo>

+    <mu2>0.9</mu2>

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<package>
+
+  <name>tiago_description</name>
+  <version>0.9.0</version>
+  <description>This package contains the description (mechanical, kinematic, visual,
+      etc.) of the TIAGO robot.  The files in this package are parsed and used by
+      a variety of other components.  Most users will not interact directly
+      with this package.</description>
+  <maintainer email="enrique.fernandez@pal-robotics.com">Enrique Fernandez</maintainer>
+  <license>Creative Commons BY-NC-ND 3.0</license>
+
+  <buildtool_depend>catkin</buildtool_depend>
+
+  <run_depend>xacro</run_depend>
+  <run_depend>pal_gazebo_plugins</run_depend>
+
+</package>

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot  xmlns:xacro="http://www.ros.org/wiki/xacro"
+        xmlns:sensor="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#sensor"
+        xmlns:controller="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#controller"
+        xmlns:interface="http://playerstage.sourceforge.net/gazebo/xmlschema/#interface"
+        name="tiago" >
+
+  <!-- The following included files set up definitions of parts of the robot body -->
+  <!-- Base -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/base/base.urdf.xacro" />
+  <!-- Torso -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/torso/torso.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- Generic simulator_gazebo plugins -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/gazebo/gazebo.urdf.xacro" />
+  <!-- Materials for visualization -->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/materials.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- Now we can start using the macros included above to define the actual robot -->
+  <xacro:base name="base"/>
+  <xacro:tiago_torso name="torso" parent="base"/>
+  
+  <!--<xacro:reem_head  name="head"  parent="torso_2_link"/>
+  <xacro:reem_arm name="arm" parent="torso_2_link" side="right" reflect="1.0"  /> -->
+  
+</robot>
+

+<launch>
+
+  <!-- Robot description -->
+  <param name="robot_description" command="$(find xacro)/xacro.py '$(find tiago_description)/robots/tiago_full.urdf.xacro'" />
+
+</launch>

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_arm_simple_transmission" params="name side number reduction" >
+    <transmission name="${name}_${side}_${number}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_${side}_${number}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>${reduction}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_${side}_${number}_joint">
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!--File includes-->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find reemc_description)/urdf/deg_to_rad.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find reemc_description)/urdf/arm/wrist.urdf.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find reemc_description)/urdf/arm/arm.transmission.xacro" />
+
+  <!--Constant parameters-->
+  <xacro:property name="arm_friction"       value="1.0" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_damping"        value="1.0" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_1_max_vel"      value="2.7" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_2_max_vel"      value="3.66" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_3_max_vel"      value="4.58" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_4_max_vel"      value="4.58" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_1_max_effort"   value="44.64" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_2_max_effort"   value="22.32" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_3_max_effort"   value="17.86" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_4_max_effort"   value="17.86" />
+  <xacro:property name="arm_eps"            value="0.02" />
+
+
+  <!-- TODO: Update dynamic models -->
+
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_arm" params="name parent side reflect">
+
+    <!--************************-->
+    <!--        SHOULDER        -->
+    <!--************************-->
+    <link name="${name}_${side}_1_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.00701 -0.00011 ${reflect*0.18627}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="1.53614" />
+<!--        <inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" /> -->
+<!--         NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.05, h=0.05 with axis parallel to x coordinate -->
+<!--        <inertia ixx="0.0026850"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.0017900" iyz="0" izz="0.0017900" /> -->
+        <inertia ixx="0.00327313329"  ixy="-0.00000460054"  ixz="-0.00025121368" iyy="0.00316047802" iyz="0.00000313158" izz="0.00157642528" />
+
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_1.dae" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+       <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_1_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_1_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_1_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 -0.31827 0" rpy="${(-165.0*reflect) * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-45.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${180.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${arm_1_max_effort}" velocity="${arm_1_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${arm_friction}" damping="${arm_damping}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-45.0 * deg_to_rad  + arm_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 180.0 * deg_to_rad - arm_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+   <link name="${name}_${side}_2_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.01435 -0.06294 ${reflect*0.01039}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="1.60393" />
+        <!--<inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" />-->
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.05, h=0.05 with axis parallel to y coordinate -->
+        <!-- <inertia ixx="0.0013417"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.0020125" iyz="0" izz="0.0013417" /> -->
+        <inertia ixx="0.0046195621"  ixy="-0.00056769245"  ixz="0.00018376961" iyy="0.00185384237" iyz="-0.00078286958" izz="0.0049356022" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_2.dae" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_2_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_2_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${name}_${side}_1_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_2_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 0 ${0.21749 * reflect}" rpy="${-90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} ${-75.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} ${90.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-15.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${120.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${arm_2_max_effort}" velocity="${arm_2_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${arm_friction}" damping="${arm_damping}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-15.0 * deg_to_rad  + arm_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 120.0 * deg_to_rad - arm_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_${side}_3_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.00606 -0.0113 ${reflect * 0.05748}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="1.64293" />
+        <!--<inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" />-->
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.05, h=0.05 with axis parallel to x coordinate -->
+         <inertia ixx="0.00372686652"  ixy="-0.00008722874"  ixz="-0.00028800176" iyy="0.00344463026" iyz="0.00042776588" izz="0.00192229026" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_3.dae" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_3_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_3_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${name}_${side}_2_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_3_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0.02 -0.142 0" rpy="${90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-135.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${157.5 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${arm_3_max_effort}" velocity="${arm_3_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${arm_friction}" damping="${arm_damping}"/>

+      <safety_controller k_position="20"

+
+    <!--************************-->

+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.05, h=0.05 with axis parallel to x coordinate -->
+        <!-- <inertia ixx="0.0012663"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.00084417" iyz="0" izz="0.00084417" /> -->
+        <inertia ixx="0.00156355749"  ixy="-0.000353141"  ixz="0.00053402452" iyy="0.00277186194" iyz="-0.00015541973" izz="0.00307369106" />
+      </inertial>

+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />

+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_4_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_4_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${name}_${side}_3_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_4_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 -0.02 ${0.088 * reflect}" rpy="0 ${90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="0" upper="${130.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${arm_4_max_effort}" velocity="${arm_4_max_vel}" />

+                         k_velocity="20"

+
+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_1_link">

+     <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+   </gazebo>

+     <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+     <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+   </gazebo>
+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_3_link">
+     <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+     <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+   </gazebo>
+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_4_link">
+     <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+     <mu2>0.9</mu2>

+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_1_joint">
+      <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+   </gazebo>
+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_2_joint">

+   </gazebo>
+   <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_3_joint">

+   </gazebo>

+    <!--************************-->

+    <xacro:reem_arm_simple_transmission name="${name}" side="${side}" number="3" reduction="1.0" />
+    <xacro:reem_arm_simple_transmission name="${name}" side="${side}" number="4" reduction="1.0" />

+  </xacro:macro>
+

+  <xacro:property name="wrist_3_max_effort"   value="6.6" />
+  <xacro:property name="wrist_eps"          value="0.02" />
+
+  <!-- TODO: Update dynamic models -->
+
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_wrist" params="name parent side reflect">
+
+    <!--************************-->
+    <!--        WRIST           -->
+    <!--************************-->
+    <link name="${name}_${side}_5_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.00044 0.00012 ${reflect * 0.07445}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="1.21524" />
+        <!-- <inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" /> -->
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.05, h=0.1 with axis parallel to z coordinate -->
+<!--         <inertia ixx="0.0027096"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.0027096" iyz="0" izz="0.0023225" /> -->
+
+      <inertia ixx="0.00193499547"  ixy="-0.00000027528"  ixz="-0.00001268153" iyy="0.00177767506" iyz="-0.00000466638" izz="0.00057101196" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_5.dae" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_5_collision.stl" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_5_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_5_link" />
+      <origin xyz="-0.088 0.02 0" rpy="0 ${-90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />

+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-120.0 * deg_to_rad + wrist_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 120.0 * deg_to_rad - wrist_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_${side}_6_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.00005 -0.00252 ${reflect * 0.00007}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.41597" />
+        <!-- <inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" /> -->
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder centered at CoM with r=0.02, h=0.08 with axis parallel to z coordinate -->
+<!--         <inertia ixx="0.0001615"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.0001615" iyz="0" izz="0.000051" /> -->
+         <inertia ixx="0.00020339659"  ixy="-0.00000071703"  ixz="-0.00000006654" iyy="0.00015240261" iyz="0.00000014315" izz="0.0001671881" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/arm/arm_6.dae" scale="1 1 ${-1*reflect}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="0.04" length="0.0385"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_6_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${name}_${side}_5_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_6_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 0 ${0.15 * reflect}" rpy="${-90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${90.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${wrist_2_max_effort}" velocity="${wrist_2_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${wrist_friction}" damping="${wrist_damping}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad + wrist_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 90.0 * deg_to_rad - wrist_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_${side}_7_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <!--TODO: Verify these inertial parameters-->
+        <origin xyz="-0.00004 0 ${reflect * -0.02887}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.06697" />
+       <!-- <inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" /> -->
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming point mass -->
+<!--         <inertia ixx="0"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0" iyz="0" izz="0" /> -->
+         <inertia ixx="0.0000123718"  ixy="0.00000000002"  ixz="0.00000002403" iyy="0.00001242132" iyz="0.00000000001" izz="0.0000059514" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 ${0.046 * reflect}" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="0.02" length="0.005"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 ${0.046 * 0.75 * reflect}" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="0.02" length="0.023"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_${side}_7_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${name}_${side}_6_link" />
+      <child link="${name}_${side}_7_link" />
+      <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="${90.0 * reflect * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-120.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${120.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="${wrist_3_max_effort}" velocity="${wrist_3_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics friction="${wrist_friction}" damping="${wrist_damping}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-120.0 * deg_to_rad + wrist_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 120.0 * deg_to_rad - wrist_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_5_link">
+      <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+      <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    </gazebo>
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_6_link">
+      <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+      <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    </gazebo>
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_7_link">
+      <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+      <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    </gazebo>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_5_joint">
+        <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+    </gazebo>
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_6_joint">
+        <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+    </gazebo>
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_${side}_7_joint">
+        <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+    </gazebo>
+
+    <!-- extensions -->
+    <xacro:reem_wrist_simple_transmission name="${name}" side="${side}" number="5" reduction="1.0" />
+    <xacro:reem_wrist_differential_transmission name="${name}" side="${side}" number_1="6" number_2="7"
+                                                act_reduction_1="-1.0" act_reduction_2="1.0"
+                                                jnt_reduction_1="-1.0" jnt_reduction_2="${-reflect}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+    <xacro:wheel side="right" reflect=" 1.0" radius="${wheel_radius}" width="${wheel_width}" torque="${wheel_torque}" velocity="${wheel_velocity}" separation="${wheel_separation}" parent="${name}"/>
+    <xacro:wheel side="left"  reflect="-1.0" radius="${wheel_radius}" width="${wheel_width}" torque="${wheel_torque}" velocity="${wheel_velocity}" separation="${wheel_separation}" parent="${name}"/>

+    <xacro:caster side="front" radius="${caster_radius}" width="${caster_width}" separation_x="${ caster_separation}" separation_y="0" offset_z="${caster_offset_z}" parent="${name}"/>

+    <!-- Antennas -->
+    <xacro:antenna_array name="antenna" parent="base_link" side="left"  reflect=" 1.0" separation_y="${antenna_separation_y}" height_0="${antenna_height_0}" height_inc="${antenna_height_inc}" />

+  </xacro:macro>

+</robot>

+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/imu.urdf.xacro"/>
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/bumper.urdf.xacro"/>

+
+  <!-- Wheel characteristics -->
+  <property name="wheel_radius"     value="0.100"/>
+  <property name="wheel_width"      value="0.044"/>
+  <property name="wheel_separation" value="0.43408"/>
+  <property name="wheel_torque"     value="6.0"/>
+  <property name="wheel_velocity"   value="1.0"/>
+
+  <!-- Caster wheel characteristics -->
+  <property name="caster_radius"       value="0.025"/>
+  <property name="caster_width"        value="0.020"/>
+  <property name="caster_separation_x" value="0.36734"/>
+  <property name="caster_separation_y" value="0.20362"/>
+  <property name="caster_offset_z"     value="-0.04252"/>
+
+  <!-- Base characteristics -->
+  <property name="base_radius" value="${(wheel_separation - wheel_width)/2 - 0.01}"/>
+  <property name="base_length" value="0.04"/>
+
+  <!-- Laser characteristics -->
+  <property name="base_laser_x" value="0.185"/>
+  <property name="base_laser_y" value="0.0"/>
+  <property name="base_laser_z" value="0.05275"/>
+
+  <!-- RGBD characteristics -->
+  <property name="base_rgbd_x" value="0.185"/>
+  <property name="base_rgbd_y" value="0.0"/>
+  <property name="base_rgbd_z" value="0.23"/>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="base" params="name">
+
+    <!-- Base -->
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.0123 0.0071 0.064" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="7.95534" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.19540233297" ixy="-0.00188862789" ixz="-0.00370655921"
+                 iyy="0.23325457568" iyz="0.00387528692"

+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />

+

+      <origin xyz="0.16919 0.14919 0.180" rpy="0.0 0.0 0.349" />
+    </xacro:ir_receiver-->
+
+    <!-- IR receiver -->

+    </xacro:ir_receiver-->

+    <xacro:wheel side="left"  reflect="-1.0" radius="${wheel_radius}" width="${wheel_width}" torque="${wheel_torque}" velocity="${wheel_velocity}" separation="${wheel_separation}" parent="${name}"/>

+    <!-- Casters wheels -->
+    <xacro:caster side="front_right" radius="${caster_radius}" width="${caster_width}" separation_x="${ caster_separation_x}" separation_y="${ caster_separation_y}" offset_z="${caster_offset_z}" parent="${name}"/>

@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="head_transmission" params="name reduction">
+    <transmission name="${name}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>${reduction}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_joint" >
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011-2012, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!--File includes-->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/deg_to_rad.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/head/head.transmission.xacro" />
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/sensors/range.urdf.xacro" />
+
+  <!--Constant parameters-->
+  <xacro:property name="head_friction" value="1.0" />
+  <xacro:property name="head_damping"  value="0.5" />
+  <xacro:property name="head_max_vel"  value="3.0" />
+  <xacro:property name="head_eps"      value="0.02" />
+
+  <!--************************-->
+  <!--     HEAD_1 (PAN)       -->
+  <!--************************-->
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_head_1" params="name parent">
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.01819	0.00248	-0.00517" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="1.11967" />
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming cylinder with r=0.06, h=0.08 -->
+<!--         <inertia ixx="0.0014125"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.0014125" iyz="0" izz="0.0017738" /> -->
+        <inertia ixx="0.00111370229"  ixy="0.00003992198"  ixz="-0.00012464155" iyy="0.00111361487" iyz="0.00001943162" izz="0.00114794061" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.03 0 0"/> <!--TODO: Remove offset when good meshes arrive-->
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/head/head_1.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.03 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/head/head_1_collision.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}"/>
+      <child link="${name}_link"/>
+      <origin xyz="0.0 -0.42316 0" rpy="${90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-75.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${75.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="3.4" velocity="${head_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics damping="${head_damping}" friction="${head_friction}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-75.0 * deg_to_rad + head_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 75.0 * deg_to_rad - head_eps}" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <mu1>0.9</mu1>
+      <mu2>0.9</mu2>
+    </gazebo>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_joint">
+       <implicitSpringDamper>1</implicitSpringDamper>
+    </gazebo>
+
+
+    <!-- extensions -->
+    <xacro:head_transmission name="${name}" reduction="1" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <!--************************-->
+  <!--      HEAD_2 (TILT)     -->
+  <!--************************-->
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_head_2" params="name parent">
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0.01183 -0.08098 0.00104" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="1.63134" />
+        <!-- NOTE: Assuming box with d=0.28433, w=0.20302, h=0.26741 -->
+<!--         <inertia ixx="0.011353"  ixy="0"  ixz="0" iyy="0.012294" iyz="0" izz="0.015345" /> -->
+        <!--NOTE: Low (0.1 or lower) diagonal inertia values make Gazebo 1.0.2 simulation unstable when head sensors are added.-->
+        <inertia ixx="0.00640199093"  ixy="0.00012197067"  ixz="-0.00000897011" iyy="0.00676228591" iyz="-0.0000552329" izz="0.00614192438" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.03 0 0"/> <!--TODO: Remove offset when good meshes arrive-->
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/head/head_2.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey" />
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.03 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://reemc_description/meshes/head/head_2_collision.stl" />
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="revolute">
+      <parent link="${parent}"/>
+        <child link="${name}_link"/>
+      <origin xyz="0.0445 0 0" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0 0" />
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+      <limit lower="${-15.0 * deg_to_rad}" upper="${45.0 * deg_to_rad}" effort="3.26" velocity="${head_max_vel}" />
+      <dynamics damping="${head_damping}" friction="${head_friction}"/>
+
+      <safety_controller k_position="20"
+                         k_velocity="20"
+                         soft_lower_limit="${-15.0 * deg_to_rad + head_eps}"
+                         soft_upper_limit="${ 20.0 * deg_to_rad}" />
+    </joint>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="reem_head" params="name parent">
+    <xacro:reem_head_1 name="${name}_1" parent="${parent}" />
+    <xacro:reem_head_2 name="${name}_2" parent="${name}_1_link"/>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+  <xacro:macro name="bumper" params="name parent ros_topic update_rate *origin">

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+
+  Laser configuraiton according with the Hokuyo URG-04LX-UG01 product specification:
+  http://www.hokuyo-aut.jp/02sensor/07scanner/download/products/urg-04lx-ug01/data/URG-04LX_UG01_spec_en.pdf
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="hokuyo_urg_04lx_ug01_laser_gazebo" params="name ros_topic update_rate min_angle max_angle">
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <sensor type="ray" name="${name}">
+        <pose>0 0 0 0 0 0</pose>
+        <update_rate>${update_rate}</update_rate>
+        <visualize>true</visualize>
+        <ray>
+          <scan>
+            <horizontal>
+              <!-- 683 steps in 240deg fov -->
+              <samples>${683*(max_angle - min_angle)/(240.0 * deg_to_rad)}</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution> <!-- not the sensor resolution; just 1 -->
+              <min_angle>${min_angle}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${max_angle}</max_angle>
+            </horizontal>
+          </scan>
+          <range>
+            <min>0.02</min>
+            <max>5.6</max>
+            <resolution>0.001</resolution>
+          </range>
+        </ray>
+        <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_laser.so" name="gazebo_ros_hokuyo_laser">
+          <gaussianNoise>0.03</gaussianNoise>
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>${update_rate}</updateRate>
+          <topicName>${ros_topic}</topicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_link</frameName>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>
+

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/hokuyo_urg_04lx_ug01_laser.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="hokuyo_urg_04lx_ug01_laser" params="name parent *origin ros_topic update_rate min_angle max_angle">
+
+     <link name="${name}_link" type="laser">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 -0.04225" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="0.160" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.00008631543" ixy="-0.00000088815" ixz="-0.00000094079"
+                 iyy="0.00008461544" iyz="0.00000139389"
+                 izz="0.00005947238" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/sensors/urg-04lx-ug01.stl"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <axis xyz="0 1 0" />
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child  link="${name}_link"/>
+      <dynamics friction="1.0" damping="1"/>
+      <limit lower="0" upper="0" effort="60" velocity="20" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- gazebo extensions -->
+    <xacro:hokuyo_urg_04lx_ug01_laser_gazebo name="${name}" ros_topic="${ros_topic}" update_rate="${update_rate}" min_angle="${min_angle}" max_angle="${max_angle}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2011-2012, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="imu_sensor" params="name parent *origin update_rate">
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.01"/>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.000001" ixy="0" ixz="0" iyy="0.000001" iyz="0" izz="0.000001"/>
+      </inertial>
+      <!--visual>
+        <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.01 0.01 0.01"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </visual-->
+    </link>
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <parent link="${parent}"/>
+      <child link="${name}_link"/>
+      <insert_block name="origin"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <sensor name="${name}_sensor" type="imu">
+        <always_on>1</always_on>
+        <update_rate>100.0</update_rate>
+        <imu>
+          <noise>
+            <type>gaussian</type>
+            <rate>
+              <mean>0.0</mean>
+              <stddev>2e-4</stddev>
+              <bias_mean>0.0000075</bias_mean>
+              <bias_stddev>0.0000008</bias_stddev>
+            </rate>
+            <accel>
+              <mean>0.0</mean>
+              <stddev>1.7e-2</stddev>
+              <bias_mean>0.1</bias_mean>
+              <bias_stddev>0.001</bias_stddev>
+            </accel>
+          </noise>
+        </imu>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.

+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="range_gazebo" params="name ros_topic update_rate maxRange minRange fov radiation" >
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <sensor type="ray" name="${name}">
+        <pose>0 0 0 0 0 0</pose>
+        <update_rate>${update_rate}</update_rate>
+        <visualize>false</visualize>
+        <ray>
+          <scan>
+            <horizontal>
+              <samples>5</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${fov/2}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${fov/2}</max_angle>
+            </horizontal>
+            <vertical>
+              <samples>5</samples>
+              <resolution>1</resolution>
+              <min_angle>-${fov/2}</min_angle>
+              <max_angle>${fov/2}</max_angle>
+            </vertical>
+          </scan>
+          <range>
+            <min>${minRange}</min>
+            <max>${maxRange}</max>
+            <resolution>0.01</resolution>
+          </range>
+        </ray>
+        <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_range.so" name="gazebo_ros_range">
+          <gaussianNoise>0.005</gaussianNoise>
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>${update_rate}</updateRate>
+          <topicName>${ros_topic}</topicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_link</frameName>
+          <minRange>${minRange}</minRange>
+          <maxRange>${maxRange}</maxRange>
+          <fov>${fov}</fov>
+          <radiation>${radiation}</radiation>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+            <resolution>0.001</resolution>
+          </range>
+        </ray>
+        <plugin filename="libgazebo_ros_laser.so" name="gazebo_ros_rplidar_laser">
+          <gaussianNoise>0.03</gaussianNoise>
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>${update_rate}</updateRate>
+          <topicName>${ros_topic}</topicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_link</frameName>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>
+

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/rplidar_laser.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="rplidar_laser" params="name parent *origin ros_topic update_rate min_angle max_angle">
+
+     <link name="${name}_link" type="laser">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 -0.04225" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <mass value="0.160" />
+        <inertia ixx="0.00008631543" ixy="-0.00000088815" ixz="-0.00000094079"
+                 iyy="0.00008461544" iyz="0.00000139389"
+                 izz="0.00005947238" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0" />
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/sensors/rplidar.stl"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey" />
+      </visual>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_joint" type="fixed">
+      <axis xyz="0 1 0" />
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child  link="${name}_link"/>
+      <dynamics friction="1.0" damping="1"/>
+      <limit lower="0" upper="0" effort="60" velocity="20" />
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- gazebo extensions -->
+    <xacro:rplidar_laser_gazebo name="${name}" ros_topic="${ros_topic}" update_rate="${update_rate}" min_angle="${min_angle}" max_angle="${max_angle}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

@@ -0,0 +1,92 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2013, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+
+  ROS Gazebo plugin for RGBD sensor with Softkinetic specifications
+   * Publishes MONO8 format "depth" image & PointCloud
+   * Publishes RGB8 format color image & 2nd copy of PointCloud (for registered)
+
+  Sensor parameters are from PR2 description.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="softkinetic_ds311_rgbd_camera_gazebo" params="name">
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <!-- IR + depth -->
+      <sensor type="depth" name="${name}_frame_sensor">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>10.0</update_rate>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${57.3 * deg_to_rad}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <format>R8G8B8</format>
+            <width>160</width>
+            <height>120</height>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.1</near>
+            <far>4.0</far>
+          </clip>
+        </camera>
+        <plugin name="${name}_frame_controller" filename="libgazebo_ros_openni_kinect.so">
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>10.0</updateRate>
+          <cameraName>softkinetic_camera</cameraName>
+          <imageTopicName>ir/image_raw</imageTopicName>
+          <cameraInfoTopicName>ir/camera_info</cameraInfoTopicName>
+          <depthImageTopicName>depth_registered/image_raw</depthImageTopicName>
+          <depthImageCameraInfoTopicName>depth_registered/camera_info</depthImageCameraInfoTopicName>
+          <pointCloudTopicName>depth_registered/points</pointCloudTopicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_optical_frame</frameName>
+          <pointCloudCutoff>0.0</pointCloudCutoff>
+          <rangeMax>4.0</rangeMax>
+          <distortionK1>0.00000001</distortionK1>
+          <distortionK2>0.00000001</distortionK2>
+          <distortionK3>0.00000001</distortionK3>
+          <distortionT1>0.00000001</distortionT1>
+          <distortionT2>0.00000001</distortionT2>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+
+      <!-- RGB -->
+      <sensor type="depth" name="${name}_frame_sensor">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>10.0</update_rate>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${50.0 * deg_to_rad}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <format>R8G8B8</format>
+            <width>640</width>
+            <height>480</height>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.1</near>
+            <far>4.0</far>
+          </clip>
+        </camera>
+        <plugin name="${name}_frame_controller" filename="libgazebo_ros_openni_kinect.so">
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>10.0</updateRate>
+          <cameraName>softkinetic_camera</cameraName>
+          <imageTopicName>rgb_data/image_raw</imageTopicName>
+          <cameraInfoTopicName>rgb_data/camera_info</cameraInfoTopicName>
+          <pointCloudTopicName>rgbd_data/points</pointCloudTopicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_optical_frame</frameName>
+          <pointCloudCutoff>0.0</pointCloudCutoff>
+          <rangeMax>4.0</rangeMax>
+          <distortionK1>0.00000001</distortionK1>
+          <distortionK2>0.00000001</distortionK2>
+          <distortionK3>0.00000001</distortionK3>
+          <distortionT1>0.00000001</distortionT1>
+          <distortionT2>0.00000001</distortionT2>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2013, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/softkinetic_ds311_rgbd_camera.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- Macro -->
+  <xacro:macro name="softkinetic_ds311_rgbd_camera" params="name parent *origin *optical_origin">
+    <joint name="${name}_frame_joint" type="fixed">
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child link="${name}_link"/>
+    </joint>
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.01"/>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.0"  ixy="0.0"  ixz="0.0"
+                 iyy="0.0"  iyz="0.0"
+                 izz="0.0"/>
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/sensors/softkinetic/softkinetic.dae"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="Grey">
+          <color rgba="0.5 0.5 0.5 1"/>
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.01 0.0025 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.04 0.185 0.03"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <insert_block name="optical_origin"/>
+      <parent link="${name}_link"/>
+      <child link="${name}_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.01"/>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.0"  ixy="0.0"  ixz="0.0"
+                 iyy="0.0"  iyz="0.0"
+                 izz="0.0"/>
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- extensions -->
+    <xacro:softkinetic_ds311_rgbd_camera_gazebo name="${name}"/>
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+
+  Sensor parameters are from PR2 description.

+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="openni_camera_gazebo_v0" params="name">
+    <gazebo reference="${name}_link">
+      <sensor type="depth" name="${name}_frame_sensor">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>30.0</update_rate>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${58.0 * deg_to_rad}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <format>R8G8B8</format>
+            <width>640</width>
+            <height>480</height>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.8</near>
+            <far>3.5</far>
+          </clip>
+        </camera>
+        <plugin name="${name}_frame_controller" filename="libgazebo_ros_openni_kinect.so">
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>30.0</updateRate>
+          <cameraName>${name}</cameraName>
+          <imageTopicName>ir/image_raw</imageTopicName>
+          <cameraInfoTopicName>/ir/camera_info</cameraInfoTopicName>
+          <depthImageTopicName>depth/image_raw</depthImageTopicName>
+          <depthImageCameraInfoTopicName>depth/camera_info</depthImageCameraInfoTopicName>
+          <pointCloudTopicName>depth/points</pointCloudTopicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_optical_frame</frameName>
+          <pointCloudCutoff>0.5</pointCloudCutoff>
+          <distortionK1>0.00000001</distortionK1>
+          <distortionK2>0.00000001</distortionK2>
+          <distortionK3>0.00000001</distortionK3>
+          <distortionT1>0.00000001</distortionT1>
+          <distortionT2>0.00000001</distortionT2>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+      <sensor type="depth" name="${name}_frame_sensor">
+        <always_on>true</always_on>
+        <update_rate>30.0</update_rate>
+        <camera>
+          <horizontal_fov>${58.0 * deg_to_rad}</horizontal_fov>
+          <image>
+            <format>R8G8B8</format>
+            <width>640</width>
+            <height>480</height>
+          </image>
+          <clip>
+            <near>0.8</near>
+            <far>3.5</far>
+          </clip>
+        </camera>
+        <plugin name="${name}_frame_controller" filename="libgazebo_ros_openni_kinect.so">
+          <alwaysOn>true</alwaysOn>
+          <updateRate>30.0</updateRate>
+          <cameraName>${name}</cameraName>
+          <imageTopicName>rgb/image_raw</imageTopicName>
+          <pointCloudTopicName>rgb/points</pointCloudTopicName>
+          <cameraInfoTopicName>rgb/camera_info</cameraInfoTopicName>
+          <frameName>${name}_optical_frame</frameName>
+          <pointCloudCutoff>0.5</pointCloudCutoff>
+          <distortionK1>0.00000001</distortionK1>
+          <distortionK2>0.00000001</distortionK2>
+          <distortionK3>0.00000001</distortionK3>
+          <distortionT1>0.00000001</distortionT1>
+          <distortionT2>0.00000001</distortionT2>
+        </plugin>
+      </sensor>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2013, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+
+  ASUS Xtion Pro Live
+    - visual model, without base
+    - collision geometry
+    - TF frames
+    - loads Gazebo plugin
+
+    Note: There is a bug that Gazebo in ROS Fuerte ignores the roll/pitch/yaw in the visual tag,
+          therefore it needs to be in a separate link, with the orientation specified at the joint.
+
+    ToDo: Fix visual mesh, re-scale it, & the origin is not centered along the frontal axis.
+          Can simplify collision mesh.
+          Rotate origin in mesh, to match the orientation of the base link and bypass the bug.
+
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/sensors/xtion_pro_live.gazebo.xacro" />
+
+  <!-- Macro -->
+  <xacro:macro name="xtion_pro_live" params="name parent *origin *optical_origin">
+    <joint name="${name}_frame_joint" type="fixed">
+      <insert_block name="origin" />
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child link="${name}_link"/>
+    </joint>
+    <link name="${name}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.01" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.0"  ixy="0.0"  ixz="0.0"
+                 iyy="0.0"  iyz="0.0"
+                 izz="0.0" />
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/sensors/xtion_pro_live/xtion_pro_live.dae" />
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="Grey">
+          <color rgba="0.5 0.5 0.5 1"/>
+        </material>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="-0.01 0.0025 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <box size="0.04 0.185 0.03"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="${name}_optical_joint" type="fixed">
+      <insert_block name="optical_origin" />
+      <parent link="${name}_link"/>
+      <child link="${name}_optical_frame"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <link name="${name}_optical_frame">
+      <inertial>
+        <mass value="0.01" />
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.0"  ixy="0.0"  ixz="0.0"
+                 iyy="0.0"  iyz="0.0"
+                 izz="0.0" />
+      </inertial>
+    </link>
+
+    <!-- extensions -->
+    <xacro:openni_camera_gazebo_v0 name="${name}" />
+
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0" ?>
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!--File includes-->
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find tiago_description)/urdf/deg_to_rad.xacro" />
+
+ <!--Constant parameters-->
+  <xacro:property name="torso_max_vel"  value="5.4" />
+  <xacro:property name="torso_max_effort"  value="78.0" />
+  <xacro:property name="torso_eps"      value="0.02" />
+
+  <xacro:macro name="tiago_torso" params="name parent">
+  
+  <link name="${name}_fixed_link">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0.053 0.55187 -0.00188" />
+      <mass value="7.19400" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.16941095831" ixy="-0.00114443001"   ixz="0.00090167218"
+               iyy="0.15113888533" iyz="-0.00744737659"
+               izz="0.04165307088" />
+    </inertial>
+    <collision>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0.13 0.45 0" />
+      <geometry>
+        <box size="0.20 0.40 0.32"/>
+      </geometry>
+    </collision>
+  </link>
+  
+  <joint name="${name}_fixed_joint" type="fixed">
+    <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.053 0 0" />
+    <parent link="${parent}_link" />
+    <child link="${name}_fixed_link" />
+    <axis xyz="0 0 0" />
+  </joint>
+  
+  <link name="${name}_lift_link">
+    <inertial>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="-0.060142360276412 0.00304133533168627 0.343272867034157" />
+      <mass value="10.81628746254819" />
+      <inertia ixx="0.0641960264706125" ixy="0.001128617953499" ixz="0.00203364821006436"
+               iyy="0.061658561971383" iyz="-3.14401755382909E-05"
+               izz="0.0376084656328484" />
+    </inertial>
+    <collision>
+      <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0 -.02 0" />
+       <geometry>
+        <box size="0.20 0.40 0.32"/>
+      </geometry>
+    </collision>
+  </link>
+  
+  <joint name="${name}_lift_joint" type="prismatic">
+    <origin rpy="0 0 0" xyz="0.0 0 0.26428" />
+    <parent link="${name}_fixed_link" />
+    <child link="${name}_lift_link" />
+    <axis xyz="0 0 1" />
+    <limit effort="450" lower="0.0" upper="0.3556" velocity="0.1" />
+    <calibration rising="0.0" />
+    <dynamics damping="1000" />
+  </joint>
+  
+ </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011-2014, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- Caster transmissions -->
+  <xacro:macro name="caster_transmission" params="name side number reduction" >
+    <transmission name="${name}_${side}_${number}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_${side}_${number}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>${reduction}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_${side}_${number}_joint" >
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/JointStateInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to

+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/wheels/caster.transmission.xacro"/>
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/wheels/caster.gazebo.xacro"/>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="caster" params="side radius width separation_x separation_y offset_z parent">
+    <link name="caster_${side}_1_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="-0.00653 -0.00008 -0.01177" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.09556"/>
+        <inertia  ixx="0.00002195406" ixy="0.00000000009" ixz="0.00000370909"
+                  iyy="0.00001717745" iyz="-0.00000000032"
+                  izz="0.00002240463"/>
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <!--box size="${radius} ${1.2 * width} ${radius}"/-->
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/wheels/caster.stl"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="Grey"/>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <!--box size="${radius} ${1.2 * width} ${radius}"/-->
+          <mesh filename="package://ant_description/meshes/wheels/caster.stl"/>
+        </geometry>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <link name="caster_${side}_2_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="0.02425"/>
+        <inertia  ixx="0.00000464376" ixy="0" ixz="0"
+                  iyy="0.00000464377" iyz="0"
+                  izz="0.00000802779"/>
+        </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${radius}" length="${width}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="DarkGrey"/>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${radius}" length="${width}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <surface>
+          <friction>
+            <ode>
+              <mu> 0.01</mu>
+              <mu2>0.01</mu2>
+            </ode>
+          </friction>
+        </surface>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="caster_${side}_1_joint" type="continuous">
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child link="caster_${side}_1_link"/>
+      <origin xyz="${separation_x / 2} ${-separation_y / 2} ${offset_z}" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <joint name="caster_${side}_2_joint" type="continuous">
+      <parent link="caster_${side}_1_link"/>
+      <child link="caster_${side}_2_link"/>
+      <origin xyz="-0.017 0.0003 -0.032" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0 0"/>
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Transmission -->
+    <!--xacro:caster_transmission name="" side="${side}" number="" reduction=""-->
+
+    <!-- Gazebo extensions -->
+    <xacro:caster_gazebo side="${side}"/>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--

+  All rights reserved.

+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="wheel_gazebo" params="side">
+    <!-- Contact model for the wheel surface -->
+    <gazebo reference="wheel_${side}_link">
+      <kp>100000000.0</kp>
+      <kd>10000.0</kd>
+      <mu1>1.0</mu1>
+      <mu2>1.0</mu2>
+      <minDepth>0.00</minDepth>
+    </gazebo>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011-2014, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <!-- Wheel transmission -->
+  <xacro:macro name="wheel_transmission" params="side">
+    <transmission name="wheel_${side}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="wheel_${side}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>1.0</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="wheel_${side}_joint" >
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/VelocityJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

@@ -0,0 +1,63 @@
+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+
+<!--
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/wheels/wheel.transmission.xacro"/>
+  <xacro:include filename="$(find ant_description)/urdf/wheels/wheel.gazebo.xacro"/>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="wheel" params="side reflect radius width torque velocity separation parent">
+    <link name="wheel_${side}_link">
+      <inertial>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 -0.0016" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <mass value="3.33926"/>
+        <inertia ixx="0.00668369447" ixy="0.00000007414" ixz="0.00000024433"
+                 iyy="0.00668332554" iyz="-0.00000005662"
+                 izz="0.01088090651"/>
+      </inertial>
+      <visual>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${radius}" length="${width}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <material name="LightGrey"/>
+      </visual>
+      <collision>
+        <origin xyz="0 0 0" rpy="0 0 0"/>
+        <geometry>
+          <cylinder radius="${radius}" length="${width}"/>
+        </geometry>
+        <surface>
+          <friction>
+            <ode>
+              <mu> 0.01</mu>
+              <mu2>0.01</mu2>
+            </ode>
+          </friction>
+        </surface>
+      </collision>
+    </link>
+
+    <joint name="wheel_${side}_joint" type="continuous">
+      <parent link="${parent}_link"/>
+      <child link="wheel_${side}_link"/>
+      <origin xyz="0 ${-separation / 2 * reflect} 0" rpy="${-90.0 * deg_to_rad} 0 0"/>
+      <axis xyz="0 0 1"/>
+      <limit effort="${torque}" velocity="${velocity / radius}"/>
+    </joint>
+
+    <!-- Transmission -->
+    <xacro:wheel_transmission side="${side}"/>
+
+    <!-- Gazebo extensions -->
+    <xacro:wheel_gazebo side="${side}"/>
+  </xacro:macro>
+</robot>

@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@

+<?xml version="1.0"?>
+<!--
+
+  Copyright (c) 2011, PAL Robotics, S.L.
+  All rights reserved.
+
+  This work is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivs 3.0 Unported License.
+  To view a copy of this license, visit http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-nd/3.0/ or send a letter to
+  Creative Commons, 444 Castro Street, Suite 900, Mountain View, California, 94041, USA.
+-->
+<robot xmlns:xacro="http://ros.org/wiki/xacro">
+
+  <xacro:macro name="wrist_simple_transmission" params="name number reduction" >
+    <transmission name="${name}_${number}_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/SimpleTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_${number}_motor" >
+        <mechanicalReduction>${reduction}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_${number}_joint">
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+  <xacro:macro name="wrist_differential_transmission"
+               params="name number_1 number_2 act_reduction_1 act_reduction_2 jnt_reduction_1 jnt_reduction_2" >
+    <transmission name="wrist_trans">
+      <type>transmission_interface/DifferentialTransmission</type>
+      <actuator name="${name}_${number_1}_motor">
+        <role>actuator1</role>
+        <mechanicalReduction>${act_reduction_1}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <actuator name="${name}_${number_2}_motor">
+        <role>actuator2</role>
+        <mechanicalReduction>${act_reduction_2}</mechanicalReduction>
+      </actuator>
+      <joint name="${name}_${number_1}_joint">
+        <role>joint1</role>
+        <offset>0.0</offset>
+        <mechanicalReduction>${jnt_reduction_1}</mechanicalReduction>
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+      <joint name="${name}_${number_2}_joint">
+        <role>joint2</role>
+        <offset>0.0</offset>
+        <mechanicalReduction>${jnt_reduction_2}</mechanicalReduction>
+        <hardwareInterface>hardware_interface/PositionJointInterface</hardwareInterface>
+      </joint>
+    </transmission>
+  </xacro:macro>
+
+</robot>

data.author: Adolfo Rodriguez
data.message:
Merge branch 'extra-joints' into 'cobalt-devel'

Use generic pal_ros_control components

Depends on:
 * [pal_ros_control/#5](https://gitlab/control/pal_ros_control/merge_requests/5) for handling dynamixels out-of-band of the actuators manager.
 * [ros_controllers/#15](https://gitlab/control/ros_controllers/merge_requests/15) for publishing dummy state for the caster joints on hardware deployments.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+# From http://support.robotis.com/en/product/dynamixel/ax_series/dxl_ax_actuator.htm#Actuator_Address_1A
+# Compliance Slope is set in 7 steps, the higher the value, the more flexibility is obtained.
+# Step |       Data Value      | Data Representative Value
+#  1   |   0(0x00) ~ 3(0x03)   | 2 (0x02)
+#  2   |   4(0x04) ~ 7(0x07)   | 4 (0x04)
+#  3   |   8(0x08) ~ 15(0x0F)  | 8 (0x08)
+#  4   |  16(0x10) ~ 31(0x1F)  | 16 (0x10)
+#  5   |  32(0x20) ~ 63(0x3F)  | 32 (0x20)
+#  6   |  64(0x40) ~ 127(0x7F) | 64 (0x40)
+#  7   | 128(0x80) ~ 254(0xFE) | 128 (0x80)
+
+dynamixel_parameters:
+  head_1_joint:
+    id: 1
+    compliance_slope: 50
+  head_2_joint:
+    id: 3
+    compliance_slope: 50

@@ -1,8 +1,14 @@
-tiago_hardware:
-  special_joints:
-    - name: 'head_1_joint'
-      type: 'dynamixel'
-      id: 1
-    - name: 'head_2_joint'
-      type: 'dynamixel'
-      id: 3
+actuators:
+  raw_data:
+    position_port: act_position
+    effort_port: act_current
+    position_cmd_port: ref_position
+    velocity_cmd_port: ref_velocity
+    effort_cmd_port: ref_current
+    current_limit_cmd_port: ref_limit_current
+
+extra_joints: ['head_1_joint', 'head_2_joint']
+
+e_stop:
+  raw_data:
+    e_stop_port: emergency_stop_state

+    <remap from="dynamixel_act" to="extra_joints/state"/>
+    <remap from="dynamixel_ref" to="extra_joints/cmd"/>
   </node>
 
 </launch>

data.author: Adolfo Rodriguez Tsouroukdissian
data.message:
Compatibility with pal_ros_control 0.4.3

Update bringup configuration so TIAGo can use the generic ros_control component
that is aware of extra joints not managed by ActuatorsManager (Dynamixel head
joints).

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,14 @@
-tiago_hardware:
-  special_joints:
-    - name: 'head_1_joint'
-      type: 'dynamixel'
-      id: 1
-    - name: 'head_2_joint'
-      type: 'dynamixel'
-      id: 3
+actuators:
+  raw_data:
+    position_port: act_position
+    effort_port: act_current
+    position_cmd_port: ref_position
+    velocity_cmd_port: ref_velocity
+    effort_cmd_port: ref_current
+    current_limit_cmd_port: ref_limit_current
+
+extra_joints: ['head_1_joint', 'head_2_joint']
+
+e_stop:
+  raw_data:
+    e_stop_port: emergency_stop_state

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
 <launch>
 
   <node name="dynamixel_node" type="dynamixel_node" pkg="dynamixel_cpp" output="screen">
-    <remap from="dynamixel_act" to="/tiago_hardware/dynamixel_act"/>
-    <remap from="dynamixel_ref" to="/tiago_hardware/dynamixel_ref"/>
+    <remap from="dynamixel_act" to="extra_joints/state"/>
+    <remap from="dynamixel_ref" to="extra_joints/cmd"/>
   </node>
 
 </launch>
